title: Beams
description: Adds projected beams that can be modified for different functions
body:
### **About**
This mod adds giant beams

![Beams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ou2p7zGr/images/eb1997cb2d1d438da85d09b31619c979d9666541.png)

### **Features**
Beams can be projected using **Projector** blocks activated with a redstone signal.  

![Projectors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ou2p7zGr/images/474ba8d8175faf4c0af9b6fa545c10d762379a06.png)

Modules can be put into projectors to change the projected beam.
